title: Trash Origins
description: Adds onto the Origins Forge Mod (v1.10.0+) with unique ideas and mechanics.
body:
# Description
This mod adds onto the Origins Forge Mod (v1.10.0+) with unique ideas and mechanics. I designed these origins with balance in mind, unlike some addons that can feel overpowered. This project under minor development, meaning bug-fixes or balance changes only.

## Currently featuring 9 Origins:
![Origins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d51d0c756ef48fad50bde79f8c9944fb85e669e.png)

## Setup
Currently, only 1.20.1 Forge/NeoForge is supported. Requires [Origins Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-forge) and [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui). Required on both server and client side.
